title: Zombies Eat Villagers
description: This mod is intended to be used alongside Drop The Meat , and is useless without it. When presented with raw vilager meat, the zombies will pick it up and eat it. This will both heal them and provide speed, strength, and resistance effects to the zombies.
body:
This mod is intended to be used alongside Drop The Meat, and is useless without it. When presented with raw vilager meat, the zombies will pick it up and eat it. This will both heal them and provide speed, strength, and resistance effects to the zombies. Details shared below. Furthermore, zombies will prioritize eating before chasing and killing. This applies to husks, drowned, and villager zombies, and any modded entities that are a child of the vanilla Zombie class.

The buffs applied are:
- Heals 4 hearts
- Speed I for 30 seconds
- Strength I for 20 seconds
- Resistance I for 15 seconds

Drop the Meat: https://modrinth.com/mod/dropthemeat
